requirement_topic.en: Button and Coin Batteries — ACCC Mandatory Safety and Information Standards
requirement_topic.zh: 纽扣/硬币电池——ACCC强制安全及信息标准
requirement_topic.zht: 鈕扣/硬幣電池——ACCC強制安全及資訊標準

summary.en: Consumer goods supplied in Australia that contain, use, or are intended to contain button or coin batteries must comply with the ACCC mandatory safety and information standards. The mandatory safety standard requires secure battery compartments and compliance testing before supply. The mandatory information standard requires prominent warnings on packaging, instructions, or the product as applicable, including lithium-battery injury warnings and medical-action advice. These obligations apply to new and second-hand consumer goods supplied on or after 2022-06-22, unless an exclusion applies.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚供应的消费品如含有、使用或拟装入纽扣/硬币电池，须符合ACCC强制安全及信息标准。强制安全标准要求电池仓安全固定，并在供应前完成合规测试。强制信息标准要求在包装、说明书或产品本体上按适用情况提供醒目警示，包括锂电池伤害警示及就医建议。除适用豁免外，该义务适用于2022年6月22日或之后供应的新旧消费品。
summary.zht: 在澳洲供應的消費品如含有、使用或擬裝入鈕扣/硬幣電池，須符合ACCC強制安全及資訊標準。強制安全標準要求電池倉安全固定，並在供應前完成合規測試。強制資訊標準要求在包裝、說明書或產品本體上按適用情況提供醒目警示，包括鋰電池傷害警示及就醫建議。除適用豁免外，該義務適用於2022年6月22日或之後供應的新舊消費品。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Goods (Products Containing Button/Coin Batteries) Safety Standard 2020 — mandatory
Consumer Goods (Products Containing Button/Coin Batteries) Information Standard 2020 — mandatory
Consumer Goods (Button/Coin Batteries) Safety Standard 2020 — mandatory
Consumer Goods (Button/Coin Batteries) Information Standard 2020 — mandatory
Competition and Consumer Act 2010, Schedule 2 — Australian Consumer Law

summary.en: China's common evidence for lithium battery packs and power banks is GB 31241-2022 safety testing, CCC certification where the product category is in scope, and transport documents such as UN 38.3. These do not create an equivalent Australian button/coin battery compliance file. If a Chinese product includes a replaceable coin cell for memory, display, remote-control, or accessory functions, the Australian secure-compartment and warning-label rules must still be assessed separately.
summary.zh: 中国锂电池组及移动电源常见资料为GB 31241-2022安全测试、适用目录下的CCC认证以及UN 38.3等运输文件。这些资料并不构成等同的澳大利亚纽扣/硬币电池合规文件。如果中国产品为记忆、显示、遥控或配件功能配置可更换硬币电池，仍须单独评估澳大利亚的安全电池仓及警示标签规则。
summary.zht: 中國鋰電池組及行動電源常見資料為GB 31241-2022安全測試、適用目錄下的CCC認證以及UN 38.3等運輸文件。這些資料並不構成等同的澳洲鈕扣/硬幣電池合規文件。如果中國產品為記憶、顯示、遙控或配件功能配置可更換硬幣電池，仍須單獨評估澳洲的安全電池倉及警示標籤規則。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) catalogue requirements where applicable
UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — transport evidence commonly held by exporters

gap.en: The Australian gap is product-specific: a power bank may be outside the button/coin rules if it contains only pouch or cylindrical rechargeable lithium cells, but the same shipment may be in scope if it also includes a button/coin cell or an accessory containing one. Chinese GB 31241 and CCC records do not prove captive fasteners, child-resistant access, drop/impact/misuse release resistance, or Australian warning content. The Australian importer should keep test evidence and artwork records before supply.
gap.zh: 澳大利亚差距取决于具体产品：如果移动电源仅含软包或圆柱形可充电锂电芯，可能不属于纽扣/硬币电池规则范围；但同一批货如另含纽扣/硬币电池，或配件中含有此类电池，则可能纳入范围。中国GB 31241及CCC资料不能证明防脱落紧固件、儿童防开启、跌落/冲击/误用下不释放电池或澳大利亚警示内容。澳大利亚进口商应在供应前保存测试证据及标签图稿记录。
gap.zht: 澳洲差距取決於具體產品：如果行動電源僅含軟包或圓柱形可充電鋰電芯，可能不屬於鈕扣/硬幣電池規則範圍；但同一批貨如另含鈕扣/硬幣電池，或配件中含有此類電池，則可能納入範圍。中國GB 31241及CCC資料不能證明防脫落緊固件、兒童防開啟、跌落/衝擊/誤用下不釋放電池或澳洲警示內容。澳洲進口商應在供應前保存測試證據及標籤圖稿記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — the Consumer Goods (Products Containing Button/Coin Batteries) Safety Standard 2020 and related ACCC button/coin battery information and battery-only standards are mandatory for in-scope consumer goods supplied in Australia
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — GB 31241 and CCC may be mandatory in China for relevant domestic categories, but they do not replace Australia's button/coin battery mandatory standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat every power bank kit, accessory, display, remote, and bundled product as a button/coin battery screening item. If any button or coin battery is present, build a separate Australian compliance file for secure compartment testing and mandatory warnings; do not rely on GB 31241, CCC, or UN 38.3 as substitutes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】应将每个移动电源套装、配件、显示模块、遥控器及捆绑产品纳入纽扣/硬币电池筛查。只要存在纽扣或硬币电池，就应单独建立澳大利亚合规文件，覆盖安全电池仓测试及强制警示；不得以GB 31241、CCC或UN 38.3替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】應將每個行動電源套裝、配件、顯示模組、遙控器及綑綁產品納入鈕扣/硬幣電池篩查。只要存在鈕扣或硬幣電池，就應單獨建立澳洲合規文件，覆蓋安全電池倉測試及強制警示；不得以GB 31241、CCC或UN 38.3替代。

requirement_topic.en: Button and Coin Batteries — Federal Register Legal Instrument
requirement_topic.zh: 纽扣/硬币电池——联邦法规登记册法律文书
requirement_topic.zht: 鈕扣/硬幣電池——聯邦法規登記冊法律文書

summary.en: The Consumer Goods (Products Containing Button/Coin Batteries) Safety Standard 2020 is an in-force Australian legislative instrument. It sets legal requirements for applicable consumer goods containing button or coin batteries, including release-resistance during reasonably foreseeable use or misuse, child-resistant battery compartments for user-replaceable batteries, captive fastener expectations, and testing of accessible non-replaceable batteries.
summary.zh: 《Consumer Goods (Products Containing Button/Coin Batteries) Safety Standard 2020》是现行澳大利亚法律文书。其对适用的含纽扣或硬币电池消费品设定法律要求，包括在可合理预见的使用或误用中不得释放电池、用户可更换电池须具备儿童防开启电池仓、防脱落紧固件要求，以及对消费者可接触的不可更换电池进行测试。
summary.zht: 《Consumer Goods (Products Containing Button/Coin Batteries) Safety Standard 2020》是現行澳洲法律文書。其對適用的含鈕扣或硬幣電池消費品設定法律要求，包括在可合理預見的使用或誤用中不得釋放電池、使用者可更換電池須具備兒童防開啟電池倉、防脫落緊固件要求，以及對消費者可接觸的不可更換電池進行測試。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Goods (Products Containing Button/Coin Batteries) Safety Standard 2020 — mandatory
Competition and Consumer Act 2010, Schedule 2 — Australian Consumer Law

summary.en: China's GB 31241-2022 lithium battery safety report is not a legal equivalent to the Australian legislative instrument. It may demonstrate aspects of lithium cell or pack safety, but it does not demonstrate compliance with Australian button/coin battery compartment and child-access requirements.
summary.zh: 中国GB 31241-2022锂电池安全报告并非该澳大利亚法律文书的法律等同文件。其可证明锂电芯或电池组安全的部分内容，但不能证明符合澳大利亚纽扣/硬币电池仓及儿童接触防护要求。
summary.zht: 中國GB 31241-2022鋰電池安全報告並非該澳洲法律文書的法律等同文件。其可證明鋰電芯或電池組安全的部分內容，但不能證明符合澳洲鈕扣/硬幣電池倉及兒童接觸防護要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — portable lithium cell and battery safety
CCC requirements where applicable to China-market products

gap.en: If the exported SKU contains a button or coin battery, Australian compliance must be mapped directly to the legislative instrument. The compliance file should not merely cite a general lithium battery report; it should show the applicable Australian sections, test basis, construction evidence, and SKU-specific labels or instructions.
gap.zh: 如果出口SKU含有纽扣或硬币电池，澳大利亚合规必须直接对应该法律文书。合规文件不应只引用通用锂电池报告，而应显示适用的澳大利亚条款、测试依据、结构证据以及SKU专属标签或说明书。
gap.zht: 如果出口SKU含有鈕扣或硬幣電池，澳洲合規必須直接對應該法律文書。合規文件不應只引用通用鋰電池報告，而應顯示適用的澳洲條款、測試依據、結構證據以及SKU專屬標籤或說明書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Consumer Goods (Products Containing Button/Coin Batteries) Safety Standard 2020 is an in-force legislative instrument for in-scope supplied goods
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China GB or CCC evidence does not replace the Australian legislative instrument

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For in-scope button/coin battery goods, cite the Federal Register instrument by name and build the evidence file against its operative sections. Treat AS/NZS, IEC, GB, or product-specific standards as test routes or supporting evidence unless the Australian instrument incorporates them.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】对于适用的纽扣/硬币电池产品，应按名称引用联邦法规登记册法律文书，并依据其有效条款建立证据文件。除非澳大利亚法律文书纳入，否则应将AS/NZS、IEC、GB或产品专项标准视为测试路径或支持证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】對於適用的鈕扣/硬幣電池產品，應按名稱引用聯邦法規登記冊法律文書，並依據其有效條款建立證據文件。除非澳洲法律文書納入，否則應將AS/NZS、IEC、GB或產品專項標準視為測試路徑或支持證據。
